title: SMP Experience
description: All the mods you will need to enhance your Minecraft experience with your friends!
body:
This is SMP Experience, the modpack for you and your friends to use on your server containing the following mods:
(Mods that must be used for the mods listed to run will not be mentioned)
- Sodium
- Sodium Extra
- Essential
- AppleSkin (Only in modpack versions 1.0.1+)
- Enhanced Block Entities
-  Mod Menu
- Uku's Armor HUD
- Zoomify
- Gamma Utils
- Iris Shaders
- Reese's Sodium Options
- FPS Reducer (Mod that limits FPS when tabbed out of the game)
- Controlling
- Chat Heads
- Chat Animation
- Centered Crosshair
- Better Ping Display
- Emoji Type
- FPS Display
- Join AutoSprint Mod
- Litematica
- Lithium
- Model Gap Fix
- No Resource Pack Warnings
- Not Enough Animations
- Xaero's World Map
- Replay Mod
- Simple Voice Chat
- Status Effect Timer
- Entity Culling (Only in modpack versions 1.0.2+)
- Very Many Players (Only in modpack versions 1.0.2+)
- FabricSkyboxes (Only in versions 1.0.3 - 1.0.x) (No 1.1.x versions as of right now)
- Debugify (Only in versions 1.0.3+ and 1.1.0+)
- Melody (Only in versions 1.0.3+ and 1.1.0+)
- Bobby (Only in versions 1.0.4+ and 1.1.1+)
- Shulker Box Tooltip (Only in versions 1.0.4+ and 1.1.1+)
- Armor Chroma For Fabric (Only in version 1.0.5+ and 1.1.2+)
- SmoothGui (Only in version 1.0.5+ and 1.1.2+)
- SmoothHud (Only in version 1.0.5+ and 1.1.2+)
- Smooth Skies (Only in version 1.0.5+ and 1.1.2+)
- Armor Trim Item Fix (Only in version 1.0.5+ and 1.1.2+)
- Capes (Only in 1.0.x versions that are 1.0.3+) (Being added to 1.1.x versions soon)
- FerriteCore (Only in versions 1.0.6+ and 1.1.3+)
- FastQuit (Only in versions 1.0.6+ and 1.1.3+)
- ImmediatelyFast (Only in versions 1.0.6+ and 1.1.3+)
- Language Reload (Only in versions 1.0.6+ and 1.1.3+)
- ModernFix (Only in versions 1.0.6+ and 1.1.3+)
- Eating Animation (Only in 1.0.x versions 1.0.5+) (Not in any 1.1.x versions until support is added)
- Better Mount HUD (Only in versions 1.0.6+ and 1.1.3+)
- Entity Model Features (Only in versions 1.0.6 and 1.1.3)
- Entity Texture Features (Only in versions 1.0.6 and 1.1.3)
- Fabrishot (Only in versions 1.0.6+ and 1.1.3+)
- LambDynamicLights (Only in versions 1.0.6+ and 1.1.3+)
- MoreCulling (Only in versions 1.0.6+ and 1.1.3+)
- Paginated Advancements & Custom Frames (Only in versions 1.0.6+ and 1.1.3+)
- Polytone (Only in versions 1.0.6+ and 1.1.3+)
- Puzzle (Only in versions 1.0.6+ and 1.1.3+)
- OptiGUI (Only in versions 1.0.6+ and 1.1.3+)
- Controlify (Only in versions 1.0.6+ and 1.1.3+)
- Cubes Without Borders (Only in versions 1.0.6+ and 1.1.3+)
- More Chat History (Only in versions 1.0.6+ and 1.1.3+)
- Your Options Shall Be Respected (Only in versions 1.0.6+ and 1.1.3+)
- Chest Tracker (Only in versions 1.0.7+ and 1.1.4+)
- Remove Reloading Screen (Only in versions 1.0.7+ and 1.1.4+)

You'll be sure whether you're playing singleplayer or multiplayer to enjoy this modpack. This pack is not only for SMP players but also for players who're ready to take their game to the next level!
(Comes with shader packs Complimentary Shaders Reimagined, BSL Shaders (1.0.3+ and 1.1.0+), and RenderPearl (1.0.3+ and 1.1.0+))
Also comes with Vanilla Tweaks Texture Pack in version 1.0.3+ and 1.1.0+
